name: Soil monitor
description: In-ground / soil probes. A member reports at least one soil measurement (moisture, temperature, EC, pH, or NPK).
notes: Membership is `atLeastOne` rather than a fixed required set: single-quantity probes (e.g. a soil pH or soil-temperature-only sensor) still qualify. soil.ec is dS/m (upstream codecs often emit uS/cm — divide by 1000).
